[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Mon Sep 17, 2007 7:31 am Believe it or not, I used to have it. My first girlfriend was an Eva fan, so I let her "borrow" it and then we broke up, so now I don't have it and have never seen one since. I still kick myself for it. That book is so freakin awesome though, if you ever find it definately snatch it up. It comes with NERV ID cards for all the main characters (Shinji, Asuka, Misato, etc...) and some blank ones so you can make your own, it's got bitchin artwork in it. Some original sketches and such... I didn't appreciate it as an RP, but it was some of the best supplemental material I've ever seen. It had all sorts of

Article: Evangelion RPG
 so you can make your own, it's got bitchin artwork in it. Some original sketches and such... I didn't appreciate it as an RP, but it was some of the best supplemental material I've ever seen. It had all sorts of in-depth information about how Evas work (skeletal system, armor, weapons...) for in case you wanted to make a new one for your story, even some pretty good information about how to make a new Angel. I miss that book.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 14, 2007 11:14 pm Make an Angel? Could you elaborate on that?
